videos.title: 21.07.26 - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
21.07.26 - RIFT Presentation RIFT is a modern trading platform that combines automated trading, manual trading, futures trading, and educational tools into one ecosystem.

Designed for both beginners and experienced traders, RIFT aims to simplify access to financial markets while providing users with tools that can help them participate more efficiently.

One of the key features of RIFT is its Auto Trading Engine, which allows users to allocate capital into automated trading strategies designed to operate without the need for constant monitoring. This enables participants to remain active in the markets without spending hours each day analyzing charts or placing trades manually.

For users who prefer direct market participation, RIFT also offers Manual Trading and Futures Trading functionality. This gives traders the flexibility to execute their own strategies, manage positions, and take advantage of market opportunities in real time.

RIFT is built around a non-custodial philosophy, meaning users maintain control of their own funds rather than depositing them into a centralized company account. This approach aligns with the growing demand for greater transparency, security, and user control within the digital asset industry.

Beyond trading, RIFT focuses heavily on education. Through training sessions, community support, and ongoing learning resources, users can develop a deeper understanding of trading, risk management, market psychology, and financial technology.

The platform also incorporates modern technologies such as AI-driven infrastructure, advanced execution systems, copy trading capabilities, and future integrations designed to create a more connected and intelligent trading environment.

Whether you are completely new to trading, looking for automated solutions, interested in futures markets, or seeking to expand your financial knowledge, RIFT aims to provide a complete ecosystem where users can learn, participate, and grow.

Key Features

• Auto Trading Engine
• Manual Trading
• Futures Trading
• Non-Custodial Infrastructure
• AI-Powered Trading Tools
• Copy Trading Features
• Educational Resources & Training
• Community Support
• Advanced Market Access
• Designed for Beginners and Experienced Traders

RIFT is built around a simple vision: making modern trading technology more accessible while helping users participate in financial markets through a combination of automation, education, and innovative infrastructure. videos.title: Why Jim Mora & Co. must revive CSU’s rushing attack + celebrating Leon Fuller with Marty Lenz
videos.summary_source_text:
Why Jim Mora & Co. must revive CSU’s rushing attack + celebrating Leon Fuller with Marty Lenz Justin Michael talks a little bit about Leon Fuller’s passing and what his legacy means to Colorado State. Justin also talks about Cecil Sapp’s legendary run alongside Bradlee Van Pelt in the early 2000’s, as well as why he’s so adamant about CSU Football needing to more effectively run the football in the Jim Mora era. Finally, Justin is joined by longtime radio broadcaster and former CSU Football player Marty Lenz to discuss Fuller and the infamous 1986 season.

videos.title: Hindi - 21.07.26 - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi - 21.07.26 - RIFT Presentation RIFT is a modern trading platform that combines automated trading, manual trading, futures trading, and educational tools into one ecosystem.

Designed for both beginners and experienced traders, RIFT aims to simplify access to financial markets while providing users with tools that can help them participate more efficiently.

One of the key features of RIFT is its Auto Trading Engine, which allows users to allocate capital into automated trading strategies designed to operate without the need for constant monitoring. This enables participants to remain active in the markets without spending hours each day analyzing charts or placing trades manually.

For users who prefer direct market participation, RIFT also offers Manual Trading and Futures Trading functionality. This gives traders the flexibility to execute their own strategies, manage positions, and take advantage of market opportunities in real time.

RIFT is built around a non-custodial philosophy, meaning users maintain control of their own funds rather than depositing them into a centralized company account. This approach aligns with the growing demand for greater transparency, security, and user control within the digital asset industry.

Beyond trading, RIFT focuses heavily on education. Through training sessions, community support, and ongoing learning resources, users can develop a deeper understanding of trading, risk management, market psychology, and financial technology.

The platform also incorporates modern technologies such as AI-driven infrastructure, advanced execution systems, copy trading capabilities, and future integrations designed to create a more connected and intelligent trading environment.

Whether you are completely new to trading, looking for automated solutions, interested in futures markets, or seeking to expand your financial knowledge, RIFT aims to provide a complete ecosystem where users can learn, participate, and grow.

Key Features

• Auto Trading Engine
• Manual Trading
• Futures Trading
• Non-Custodial Infrastructure
• AI-Powered Trading Tools
• Copy Trading Features
• Educational Resources & Training
• Community Support
• Advanced Market Access
• Designed for Beginners and Experienced Traders

RIFT is built around a simple vision: making modern trading technology more accessible while helping users participate in financial markets through a combination of automation, education, and innovative infrastructure. videos.title: THE SHOW GOES ON! Carolina Hurricanes Announce the Launch of Their Own Sports Network
videos.summary_source_text:
THE SHOW GOES ON! Carolina Hurricanes Announce the Launch of Their Own Sports Network Good news, everyone! We have an idea of which sports network the Carolina Hurricanes will be on next season! It'll be their own! What does this mean for the team and the fans? On the Wednesday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes,  Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on the announcement of the Hurricanes launching their own sports network. Since the closing of the regional broadcasts, i.e., FanDuel, Bally, etc., what does it mean to focus on a more local, team-specific platform? Also, we know who will call games for the Hurricanes in 2026-27. Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on why this new era of Hurricanes broadcasting will be better for the team and fans overall. Since the team will own and operate it all, it could mean better production and just having it be done in-house, while working in collaboration with the NHL. Finally, Zach shares more Canes news, especially the annual Canes 5K, which is held before the preseason. What other news is surrounding the Hurricanes as we are another day closer to the 2026-27 season? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: AJ Jones Has The Most Iconic Trick Shot On Golf Social Media | Closed Course
videos.summary_source_text:
AJ Jones Has The Most Iconic Trick Shot On Golf Social Media | Closed Course Welcome back to another episode of Closed Course!

The guys are back with another great interview, this time catching up with golf trick-shot master AJ Jones. From long drive competitions to viral golf social media videos, AJ has built a phenomenal following in the golf community through his unique approach to growing a love for the game. A former Division I baseball player at Long Beach State University, AJ transitioned into golf content creation after his collegiate career. He credits his baseball background for the incredible trick shots that require elite hand-eye coordination. AJ's brand isn't just about golf, either. Much of his content is centered around charity work and giving back to the community.

From his iconic stinger trick shot to his time and accolades as a professional long driver, this interview with AJ is a must-listen for golf fans.

You can find AJ on Instagram and TikTok @ajjonesgolf, and you can visit his website at ajjonesgolf.com.

After wrapping things up with AJ, the guys get into some general golf talk, including the Korn Ferry Tour and how more celebrities are starting to get into the game, including Justin Gaethje.
Tune in to the Closed Course podcast every Tuesday at 6:00 a.m. for great golf conversations and unforgettable interviews with all sorts of unique guests.

Hosted by Blake Horstmann, Nick Mertz, Erik Bradley, and Liam Johnson

Powered by Pins and Aces

videos.title: Nick Ferguson Breaks Down Training Camp | Broncos 2026 Season Predictions, Bo Nix | After the Horn
videos.summary_source_text:
Nick Ferguson Breaks Down Training Camp | Broncos 2026 Season Predictions, Bo Nix | After the Horn The Denver Broncos are just days away from training camp, and there's plenty to discuss.

This week on After the Horn, Tom Green and Woody Paige are joined by former Broncos safety Nick Ferguson for an in-depth conversation about the biggest storylines surrounding the 2026 Denver Broncos. From realistic expectations for Bo Nix's second season to Jonathan Cooper's uncertain future, Davis Webb taking over play-calling duties, the Broncos' running game, and why Denver's defense could once again carry the team, the crew breaks down everything fans need to know before camp opens.

Plus, Nick shares incredible behind-the-scenes stories from his playing career, including the famous Champ Bailey interception against the Patriots, defending elite NFL tight ends, and what it takes to play safety in today's NFL.

The show also dives into the FIFA World Cup Final, Colorado football, Georgia Tech vs. Colorado, and much more.

videos.title: This Is Why You Struggle To Grip The Ice
videos.summary_source_text:
This Is Why You Struggle To Grip The Ice The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

How Badly Do The Pittsburgh Penguins Want Stars Winger Jason Roberston? | DLLS Stars Podcast Become a DIEHARD! alldlls.com/diehard


The Other 31: Pittsburgh Penguins

We started our summer series with the Philadelphia Flyers and PHLY’s Charlie O’Connor last week (July 13th). So, we are going to stick with the Metropolitan Division and talk about the Pittsburgh Penguins. Last summer we thought the Penguins were going to be bad - a non-playoff team, but not bad enough to tank for the Gavin McKenna top draft pick. The Pens surprised a lot of people by being pretty decent all year and making the playoffs, before losing to the Philadelphia Flyers in the first round. So, what are the next steps for GM Kyle Dubas and particularly for head coach Dan Muse, who now has one year under his belt as an NHL bench boss?

videos.title: Your Brain Needs These 5 Foods | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
Your Brain Needs These 5 Foods | Dr. Mandell Did you know that what you eat every week can have a powerful impact on your brain and cardiovascular health? In this video, Dr. Alan Mandell explains five science-backed foods that can support healthy blood vessels, improve circulation, reduce inflammation, and help maintain healthy blood pressure and cholesterol levels—all important factors for lowering stroke risk as part of a healthy lifestyle. Learn why berries, leafy green vegetables, fatty fish, beans and lentils, and extra virgin olive oil deserve a regular place on your plate, along with a bonus food that offers additional heart-healthy benefits. You'll also discover the physiology behind how these foods nourish your arteries and brain, along with simple ways to include them in your weekly meals. Small, consistent changes can make a meaningful difference over time. Watch until the end to learn practical tips that can help you build a healthier lifestyle and support your long-term brain and heart health. As always, consult your healthcare provider before making significant dietary changes, especially if you have an existing medical condition or take prescription medications.

videos.title: The Modern Bunker Technique Making Amateurs Look Like Tour Pros
videos.summary_source_text:
The Modern Bunker Technique Making Amateurs Look Like Tour Pros Struggling with bunker shots? In this video, I team up with an ex-European Tour professional to reveal the modern bunker technique that many of today's Tour players use to escape the sand with more height, spin, and consistency.

We'll break down the key fundamentals behind great greenside bunker shots, including setup, clubface, body movement, and the common mistakes that stop golfers from getting out of bunkers first time.

If you want to improve your bunker play, lower your scores, and gain confidence from the sand, this lesson is packed with simple bunker tips you can take straight to the golf course.

Whether you're a beginner or a low handicap golfer, these golf bunker tips and short game drills will help you become a much better player around the greens.

videos.title: Bedard signs his extension & Greaves arbitration filing ft. Greg Wyshynski & Jack Campbell
videos.summary_source_text:
Bedard signs his extension & Greaves arbitration filing ft. Greg Wyshynski & Jack Campbell On today’s episode of The Sheet, Jeff Marek is joined by Greg Wyshynski of ESPN. The big news of the weekend, Connor Bedard signing a 5 year, $15M AAV extension with Chicago. Jeff and Greg discuss that deal, the intricacies hidden in it, and what it means for the Blackhawks 5 year outlook.

They also dive into this morning's news of Jet Greaves arbitration filings. The young netminder and the Columbus Blue Jackets remain millions of dollars apart. Will they figure out a deal in the next 48 hours, or will an arbitrator have to decide whether Greaves is paid like a young backup goalie or a legit number one? Wysh also shares his thoughts on the NHL's evolving regional sports network saga and the league's broadcast bootcamp that took place recently.

Finally, we welcome former Dallas Stars, LA Kings, Toronto Maple Leafs, and Edmonton Oilers goaltender Jack Campbell to the show. Jack recently announced his retirement from hockey. He opens up about his mental health struggles, how he persevered through them, and what his post-playing career will look like.

#TheSheet #NHL #NHLOffseason #NHLFreeAgency #Hockey #MapleLeafs #Oilers #Kings #Stars #ESPN #NHLBroadcast #Blackhawks #chicagoblackhawks #Bedard #BlueJackets #ColumbusBlueJackets #Greaves

https://nationgear.ca/collections/daily-faceoff On today’s episode of The Sheet, Jeff Marek is joined by Greg Wyshynski of ESPN. The big news of the weekend, Connor Bedard signing a 5 year, $15M AAV extension with Chicago. Jeff and Greg discuss that deal, the intricacies hidden in it, and what it means for the Blackhawks 5 year outlook.

They also dive into this morning's news of Jet Greaves arbitration filings. The young netminder and the Columbus Blue Jackets remain millions of dollars apart. Will they figure out a deal in the next 48 hours, or will an arbitrator have to decide whether Greaves is paid like a young backup goalie or a legit number one? Wysh also shares his thoughts on the NHL's evolving regional sports network saga and the league's broadcast bootcamp that took place recently.

Finally, we welcome former Dallas Stars, LA Kings, Toronto Maple Leafs, and Edmonton Oilers goaltender Jack Campbell to the show. Jack recently announced his retirement from hockey. He opens up about his mental health struggles, how he persevered through them, and what his post-playing career will look like.

Who are the **10 best players on the Dallas Cowboys** heading into training camp? Jeff Cavanaugh and Jesse Holley build their list and debate whether a rookie has already earned a spot, if a kicker belongs among the elite, and which stars just missed the cut.

Then it's time for our **Cowboys Training Camp Preview: Cornerbacks.** Can DaRon Bland bounce back to his All-Pro level? Is rookie Shavon Revel ready to start in the NFL? And has Cobie Durant already locked down one of the starting outside corner jobs?

Plus, we look around the league at the biggest **NFL trends for 2026** and discuss whether the Cowboys are built to capitalize on where the game is headed.

Qwen 3.8 Max Preview Full Free Course (1 Hour): Coding, Images, Video, Agents, Coda IDE & Obsidian Memory

This one-hour free course previews Alibaba’s open-source Qwen 3.8 Max Preview, described as a 2.4T-parameter model evolving daily, with free access at chat.qwen.ai (no login required). The video tours Qwen Studio features (model selection, settings, voice, memories, projects, chat history), demonstrates parallel workflows for coding, image generation (via Qwen 3.7 Plus), video generation (5-second previews), Web Dev previews, artifacts, and deployment/sharing. It highlights benchmarking claims (top five on GoldieBench) and shows many coding/game examples, noting Qwen 3.8 often needs feedback and can be slow. Deep Research is criticized for hallucinations and limited availability on 3.8. The presenter compares Qwen 3.7 vs 3.8 on working apps/sites, explains using Qoda/Coder IDE and CLI (context window controls, agent/expert modes), integrating Qwen into an Agent OS and Hermes agent workflows (automation, MCPs like Blender), and recommends Obsidian as a cross-model memory system.

videos.title: "Inget slår min Koenigsegg Jesko, men jag behöver andra sportbilar!"
videos.summary_source_text:
"Inget slår min Koenigsegg Jesko, men jag behöver andra sportbilar!" Ronnie Gustafsson lägger inte upp något på sociala medier, men för två år sedan fick jag intervjua honom om hans Koenigsegg CCXR – och det är min mest sedda film med 300 000 visningar.
Nu har jag fått en till exklusiv intervju på den fantastiska bilutställningen The Aurora, där Ronnie visade upp tio av sina favoritbilar, som bjöd på en "Bilsymfoni!"
Inget överskuggar hans Jesko, som han redan har hunnit köra på bana med två gånger och ska lära sig göra 360-svängar med. En bil för runt 35 miljoner …
Men i samlingen finns bilar som är magiska på andra vis. 
Vi snackar körglädje, bilutveckling, varför Jeskon har fått en alldeles speciell grön färg, favoriter, bilkörning, bankörning, restomods, familjen Koenigsegg, elbilar och om den tredje Koenigsegg han beställt …
Jag har en stående inbjudan till hans garage, där hela samlingen finns! Så det kommer mera längre fram.
Stort tack!

Se till att prenumerera så du inte missar något!

Se filmerna utan reklam före alla andra: 
Bli gärna medlem och stöd kanalen, som blir reklamfri! 29 kr/månad
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCU-4UJDGqQWK5Iv4wXDlzGQ/join

videos.title: Steve Yzerman Out, Robertson Arbitration & Hellebuyck Watch | DFO Rundown
videos.summary_source_text:
Steve Yzerman Out, Robertson Arbitration & Hellebuyck Watch | DFO Rundown Steve Yzerman is out as General Manager of the Detroit Red Wings, creating one of the biggest NHL storylines of the summer. What led to the surprising front office change, and what does it mean for Dylan Larkin, Moritz Seider, Lucas Raymond, and the future of the Red Wings?

Jason Gregor and Mike Rupp break down Detroit's next steps, discuss Jason Robertson's looming arbitration hearing with the Dallas Stars, and explain why his next contract could have ripple effects across the NHL. videos.title: What's Inside The TaylorMade Tour Truck? (Exclusive Pro Access!)
videos.summary_source_text:
What's Inside The TaylorMade Tour Truck? (Exclusive Pro Access!) Guy takes you inside the TaylorMade Tour Truck for an exclusive look at where the world’s best players have their clubs built, adjusted and perfected. From custom equipment to some very famous player drawers, this is a proper behind-the-scenes tour.

Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

videos.summary_source_text:
This Golf Swing Advice Is Holding You Back  #shorts #golfswing #golf #ericcogorno #shorts 

In this golf lesson, Eric Cogorno replaces the low and slow golf swing takeaway with one simple mantra — wide and up — and two golf drills to make it stick.

🏌️ WORK WITH ERIC COGORNO IN PERSON!
Two-Day Golf Schools in Florida and Pennsylvania - Limited Spots Available!
📞 Call or text us at ‪(610) 756-7730‬ to discuss if our golf schools are a good fit for you.
👉 Register Here: https://bit.ly/48bbScn

🎯 PERSONALIZED ONLINE COACHING
Get Custom Golf Instruction from Eric Cogorno
👉 Learn More: https://www.cogornogolf.com

📚 STEP-BY-STEP TRAINING PROGRAMS
Eric's Complete Golf Improvement System
👉 Start Here: https://ericcogornogolf.podia.com

⭐ OUR AWESOME PARTNERS AND DISCOUNT CODES ⭐
🏌️ Takomo Golf Clubs - https://takomogolf.com
👕 Bobby Jones Apparel: https://bobbyjones.com/COGORNO
Code: COGORNO25 for 25% OFF
🧥 Sunice Apparel: https://sunice.com/COGORNO
Code: COGORNO25 for 25% OFF
🎯 Precision Impact Right Wrist Trainer - https://pureswingproducts.com/?sca_ref=1815522.bXQUsGp2bS (Code: COGORNO for $20 OFF)
⛳ theHanger Training Aid - https://www.hangergolf.com/?sca_ref=944104.HqM9GYcX2I (Code: COGORNO for 15% OFF)

If you've ever been told to keep the club low and slow in your golf swing takeaway, this video will make you rethink everything. Eric Cogorno shows exactly why low and slow sends the club too far inside and under plane — and replaces it with two simple mantras any golfer can use: wide and up with the arms and club, centered and turned with the body. Watch how Adam Scott and Nelly Korda start their golf backswing with the club head above the hip while the hands stay below — and how the lead hand and trail hand drills give you the same feeling in minutes. These golf backswing tips apply to any golfer regardless of handicap or ability level. If you leave this video without trying the lead hand only drill, you're leaving a better golf swing takeaway on the table.

What You'll Learn:
• Why low and slow in the golf swing takeaway sends the club too far inside and under plane
• The wide and up mantra: butt of the club outside the trail thigh, club head above the hip
• How Adam Scott and Nelly Korda execute a wide and up golf swing takeaway
• The centered and turned body mantra that prevents the upper body from drifting away from the target
• The lead hand only drill for training width and centered turn in the golf backswing

videos.title: Who makes the STRONGEST engines? Merc v Toyota v Land Rover
videos.summary_source_text:
Who makes the STRONGEST engines? Merc v Toyota v Land Rover We test the strength and reliability of an old Toyota Land Cruiser, Land Rover Discovery and Mercedes ML by running the cars at full throttle for as long as possible. 

Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-21-07

Who builds the strongest engines - Toyota, Land Rover, or Mercedes? 

Well, to find out, we’re pushing our £2,000 Toyota Land Cruiser, Land Rover Discovery and Mercedes ML to the limit to see which lasts the longest. 

They’re no longer road-worthy, but which can last the longest when pushed to full throttle?  First off, let’s take a closer look at the contenders: 

Starting with the Discovery 3, it’s powered by a 2.7-litre V6 that produces 190hp and 440Nm. It’s equipped with a 6-speed manual and weighs 2,419kg. It was first released in 2005, we bought it for £1,500, and it currently has 256,000 miles on the clock. 

Up next is the Mercedes ML. There’s a 2.7-litre inline-5 turbo diesel under the bonnet, and this produces 163hp and 400Nm. It’s equipped with a 5-speed automatic gearbox, weighs around 2,100kg, and was released in 2005. We bought it for £1,800, and it has 140,000 miles on the clock. 

Finally, we come to the Land Cruiser. It’s powered by a 4.7-litre V8, and this puts down 235hp and 434Nm. It rolls up with a 4-speed automatic gearbox, and it weighs 2,260kg. It was originally released in 2002, and although it was originally bought for £5,000, it’s only worth around £2,000 now. To date, it’s run around 282,000 miles.

videos.title: Rotera med en mening…
videos.channel: Bättre & Enklare golf med Marcus Edblad PGA
videos.summary_source_text:
Rotera med en mening… Vi behöver rotera för att hjälpa våra händer förflytta sig men allt annan rotation är bortkastad energi.

#golf #golftips #golfswing 

0:00 Intro till lär dig rotera med en mening. 

Nu finns det möjlighet att genom appen Skillest göra mig till din personliga tränare. Du hittar mig på denna länk: https://skillest.com/app/profile/marcus-edblad

Låt mig hjälpa dig finna bättre slag, bollträff, riktning och svinghastighet. Oavsett om du slår en wedge, järnklubba eller driver kan du med dina händer lära dig golfslag som du inte trodde var möjliga. Längre och rakare slag kräver alltid träning men något alla kan lära sig.  

Vare sig du kämpar med en slice eller en hook så har jag videos som kan guida till bättre golf. Är du nybörjare så kan du börja med min grönt kort eller nybörjarkurs.

Försök ersätta dåliga vanor med nya bättre vanor. Oavsett vilket loft eller skaft din klubba har så är det du som bestämmer vad som ska hända. Oavsett om det står callaway, ping, titleist eller taylor made på klubban så kan du slå bra slag.

Var noga med vad du tittar på. Det finns många duktiga instruktörer på nätet, några av mina favoriter är Mike Malaska, Mike Dunaway, Mike Austin.

Försök fokusera på grunderna i slaget bollträff, bladkontroll och svingspår. Träna med fördel på en sak i taget. Tränar du din svinghastighet måste du tillåta att det går snett och tränar du raka slag kan du inte samtidigt svinga i max fart.

Ha tålamod och låt det ta sin tid, luras inte av genvägar som bara gör att du tappar fokus från det viktiga. Golf kommer alltid vara svårt men vi kan med träning se till att vi blir bättre för varje dag som går.

Titta mycket på golf på TV. Bryson Dechambeu, Dustin Johnson, Rory Mcilroy kan inspirera till längre slag och andra som Tiger Woods, Viktor Hovland, Ludvig Åberg och Phil Mickelson kan ge dig fantasi att skapa nya slag.

Träna styrketräning för hela kroppen för att må bra genom livet och skapa en effektiv maskin. Träna händer, handleder och armar för att skapa en effektiv release och mer svinghastighet.

Du kan finna inspiration i filmer som Happy Gilmore, Tin Cup eller Bagger Vance. Filmer som Rocky kan ge dig motivation att ta dig till gymet. Legender som Arnold Schwarzenegger, Sylvester Stallone eller Hulk Hogan kan få dig att vilja bli starkare och Moe Norman, Arnold Palmer, Ben Hogan, Sam Snead eller Jack Nicklaus kan inspirera dig att bli en bättre golfare. 

Ge aldrig upp i sökandet och träningen för att få bästa bollträff, bladkontroll och svingspår.

Filmat med iPhone 17 och redigerat i iMovie på en Macbook. Vi behöver rotera för att hjälpa våra händer förflytta sig men allt annan rotation är bortkastad energi.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

• Drivers

• Amazing golf courses

videos.title: 20.07.26 - HIP-4 Explained: The Future of Prediction Markets on Hyperliquid
videos.summary_source_text:
20.07.26 - HIP-4 Explained: The Future of Prediction Markets on Hyperliquid Welcome to Bonus Episode 3 of the RIFT Before You Quit series on Predictions market.

In this special technical deep dive, we explore HIP-4 (Hyperliquid Improvement Proposal 4) and how it forms the foundation for the next generation of on-chain prediction markets inside the RIFT ecosystem.

Prediction markets are much more than simple yes-or-no betting systems. They require sophisticated infrastructure capable of creating outcome contracts, matching buyers and sellers, managing collateral, recording ownership, resolving real-world events, and distributing payouts transparently. This episode explains how Hyperliquid's HIP-4 framework provides that infrastructure and why it represents a major advancement in decentralized financial markets.

Topics covered include:

- What HIP-4 is and why it was created
- How prediction markets differ from perpetual futures trading
- The importance of fully collateralized outcome contracts
- Why outcome markets require specialised blockchain infrastructure
- Binary markets, range markets and multi-outcome contracts
- How outcome shares are created, traded and settled
- Understanding market probabilities through pricing
- Order books within prediction markets
- Event resolution and transparent settlement mechanisms
- How collateral protects participants
- Why prediction markets cannot rely on simple web interfaces alone
- The role of smart contracts in automated settlement
- Market liquidity and capital efficiency
- Risk management within outcome-based trading
- How prediction market contracts are represented on Hyperliquid
- Why bounded outcomes create predictable maximum risk
- The technical differences between prediction markets and leveraged derivatives
- How traders can enter and exit positions before final settlement
- Why prediction markets are active trading markets rather than traditional wagering systems
- The importance of trusted data sources and objective event resolution
- Infrastructure required to support decentralized prediction markets at scale

The episode also explains why RIFT chose to build its prediction market framework on Hyperliquid's HIP-4 infrastructure rather than developing an entirely separate settlement engine. By leveraging specialised protocol-level functionality, RIFT can focus on delivering an intuitive trading experience while benefiting from transparent on-chain execution, efficient order matching and secure settlement.

You'll also gain an understanding of how prediction markets may eventually integrate with the wider RIFT ecosystem, including Smart Money, automated trading infrastructure, market intelligence tools and future AI-powered trading systems.

Whether you're new to prediction markets or want to understand the technology powering one of RIFT's newest features, this episode provides a comprehensive introduction to the mechanics, architecture and future potential of decentralized outcome markets.

As blockchain technology continues to evolve, prediction markets are expected to become an increasingly important component of decentralized finance, allowing participants to trade on real-world events through transparent, fully collateralized and non-custodial infrastructure.

videos.title: Hindi - 20.07.26 - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi - 20.07.26 - RIFT Presentation RIFT is a modern trading platform that combines automated trading, manual trading, futures trading, and educational tools into one ecosystem.

Designed for both beginners and experienced traders, RIFT aims to simplify access to financial markets while providing users with tools that can help them participate more efficiently.

One of the key features of RIFT is its Auto Trading Engine, which allows users to allocate capital into automated trading strategies designed to operate without the need for constant monitoring. This enables participants to remain active in the markets without spending hours each day analyzing charts or placing trades manually.

For users who prefer direct market participation, RIFT also offers Manual Trading and Futures Trading functionality. This gives traders the flexibility to execute their own strategies, manage positions, and take advantage of market opportunities in real time.

RIFT is built around a non-custodial philosophy, meaning users maintain control of their own funds rather than depositing them into a centralized company account. This approach aligns with the growing demand for greater transparency, security, and user control within the digital asset industry.

Beyond trading, RIFT focuses heavily on education. Through training sessions, community support, and ongoing learning resources, users can develop a deeper understanding of trading, risk management, market psychology, and financial technology.

The platform also incorporates modern technologies such as AI-driven infrastructure, advanced execution systems, copy trading capabilities, and future integrations designed to create a more connected and intelligent trading environment.

Whether you are completely new to trading, looking for automated solutions, interested in futures markets, or seeking to expand your financial knowledge, RIFT aims to provide a complete ecosystem where users can learn, participate, and grow.

Key Features

• Auto Trading Engine
• Manual Trading
• Futures Trading
• Non-Custodial Infrastructure
• AI-Powered Trading Tools
• Copy Trading Features
• Educational Resources & Training
• Community Support
• Advanced Market Access
• Designed for Beginners and Experienced Traders

RIFT is built around a simple vision: making modern trading technology more accessible while helping users participate in financial markets through a combination of automation, education, and innovative infrastructure. videos.title: Bedard Signs New Contract | Which Players Would Avs Freeze If Another Expansion Draft Took Place?
videos.summary_source_text:
Bedard Signs New Contract | Which Players Would Avs Freeze If Another Expansion Draft Took Place? Connor Bedard inks a 5-year, $15 million AAV deal with the Chicago Blackhawks, raising fresh questions about modern NHL contract strategies. Is Bedard leaving money on the table, or betting on himself with flexible term in a rising salary cap era? Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson compare Bedard’s blockbuster contract to Leo Carlsson’s, discuss the implications for Chicago’s rebuild, and speculate how future deals—like Cale Makar’s potentially massive extension with the Colorado Avalanche—might reshape the league’s financial landscape.

The conversation shifts to a hypothetical NHL expansion draft: which Colorado Avalanche players would be protected or exposed? Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson make their picks, debate keeping veterans like Nazem Kadri or Logan O’Connor, and consider sleeper choices for an expansion roster. Plus, hear a first-hand account of encountering the Stanley Cup up close. How would you freeze the Avalanche roster if the draft happened today?

videos.title: Claude Is More Powerful Than You Think
videos.summary_source_text:
Claude Is More Powerful Than You Think *Free Claude Guide:* https://clickhubspot.com/xr0f

I walk through how I use Claude like a pro with 12 simple and useful tools. I show how Claude Cowork can work with files on my computer, read customer interviews, write reports, and make slide decks. I also use Claude Code to build small apps and tools without writing code myself.

I explain how to make and share Claude Artifacts, design landing pages with Claude Design, clean up Excel files, fix formulas, and build presentations. I also show how Claude Skills help me keep my brand colors, style, and voice the same each time.

I use Claude Projects and connectors to bring in files from Google Drive, Gmail, Slack, and other apps. I show how Claude can check long documents for mistakes, use Chrome to complete web tasks, learn my writing style, and use Dispatch to run work on my computer from my phone.

This Claude guide is for anyone who wants to use Claude for work, research, writing, spreadsheets, presentations, apps, and daily tasks. *Free Claude Guide:* https://clickhubspot.com/xr0f

videos.title: We Should Have An Answer To The Jason Robertson Saga In A Week Or Less | DLLS Stars Podcast
videos.summary_source_text:
We Should Have An Answer To The Jason Robertson Saga In A Week Or Less | DLLS Stars Podcast Become a DIEHARD! alldlls.com/diehard

Happy Monday! Jason Robertson and the Dallas Stars have an arbitration hearing scheduled for Saturday, July 25th. While the two parties could reach an agreement at any time this week, if they actually go through the hearing on Saturday, then the arbitrator will hand down the final decision within 48 hours after that hearing. So, we should have an answer on the Robertson-Stars contract no later than next Monday, July 27th. Also on today’s show, Connor Bedard and the Chicago Blackhawks agreed to a five-year, $75 million contract with an AAV of $15M, which takes the 21-year old phenom through the 2030-31 season. Former Stars first round draft pick Jack Campbell announced his retirement from the NHl, Glenn Healy continues to do big things for the NHL Alumni Association and much more.

videos.title: Rotate with a purpose…
videos.channel: Better & Easier golf with your guide Marcus Edblad
videos.summary_source_text:
Rotate with a purpose… Everything we do should have a proper purpose and rotation without a good reason is just stupid. Rotation should happen to support how you want to move the club. 

#golfswing #golf #golftips 

Online lesson are now a possibility on Skillest: https://skillest.com/app/profile/marcus-edblad

0:00 Intro to how to rotate with a purpose in an effortless golf swing. 

Let me help you get an effortless golfswing with speed, distance and accuracy. I call it the circle of speed. A good release will help you to a better impact and longer drives and irons without slice and hook. How to swing a golf club need to be adjusted to your skill level and experience. 

Long and straight is the goal for everyone but it takes time. Try to focus on one thing not everything when you practise. Impact, face control and swingpath will always be the most important part to drill. We focus too much on rotation but no good golf shot will be executed just by rotating. 

We also need to understand that many myths in golf are misleading. Everything that you find on the internet isn’t true. Ben Hogan, Sam Snead are two of the legends that are often misunderstood.  To understand golf we need to take it step by step and learn every part of the swing before we move on to the next. It's like a big jigsaw puzzle that we all can figure out. 

A will never call a slice sexy but a high draw is beautiful in a very special way. Some pro's that hit draw: Rory McIroy, Xander Schauffele, Patrick Reed, Sepp Straka, Bryson Dechambeau  and many, many more. 

We shall not keep our head still, only start with the hips, look only at the ball or keep the left or right arm straight. Understand what do do with the club and let your body find the best way possible. 

This is not Rick Shiels, Saguto golf, Danny Maude, Meandmygolf, the Average Golfer, Malaska, Mark Crossfield, Alex Elliot Golf or Paige Spiranac. This is a method that anyone can learn if you give it a chance. 

If you use callaway, ping, titleist, takomo or taylor made clubs doesn’t matter you can learn to hit good golf shots. Your loft or your shaft on the club will not change but you can always get better. 

Find what inspires you. Golf basics are the same for everyone. The pga tour, longdrivers or other good golfers can all help you find better golf shots. Watch what they do instead of listed to what they say. Listen mostly to your body and figure out what you need to do to produce the same results as the pros on TV. Be careful when you watch a golf swing in slow motion. The result isn't always what the golfer is trying to do. Feel and real are seldom the same. 

We can find inspiration in a lot of things. You can find training motivation watching movies like Rocky, Tin Cup or Happy Gilmore and find mental inspiration in legends like Arnold Schwarzenegger, Hulk Hogan, Sylvester Stallone or Mike Tyson. Maybe we sometimes need to hear about crazy achievements from people like David Goggins, Jocko Willink, Ct Fletcher, Jim Rohn or Tony Robbins. 

Mike Malaska, Mike Austin, Mike Dunaway, Pete Cowen and Steve Pratt are some of my favorite golf instructors online. Find the tips that make your golf better. Decide what you want to hit. I teach a draw but many like a fade and nobody likes a hook or slice. 

Your hips or your lag is not the key to golf. Your hands will decide the shot and you can do like Tiger Woods and trust your hands. Teach your hands to hit different shots. Hit big hooks and slices to understand what happens. Only straight is not gonna teach you anything. 

Bryson Dechambeu and Kyle Birkshire can inspire you to hit it longer. Tiger Woods and Phil Mickelson can give you inspiration and motivation to test new things and new golf shots. Linn Grant, Viktor Hovland and Ludvig Aberg can show you the future of golf. 

The Masters, Players Championship, The Players, The Open and US Open can make you love golf even more. See the best in the world solve all the problems we all need to master any golf course. Golf is a craft and you need fantasy, feel and skills to master it.

Questions my videos will answer:

How to swing faster. How to hit longer. How to swing faster. How to hit your irons better. How to be better at anything. How to master the circle of speed. How to get a better short game. How to hit your wedge better. How to release the golf club. How to rotate in golf. Best tips for beginner golfers. How to hit down on the ball. How to hit up on the ball. How to rotate hips in the golf swing. How to hit straight every time. How to stop slicing. How to swing effortlessly. 

#subscribe #golftips #pga  #hurricane 


Filmed with Iphone 15 pro or Iphone 17 Everything we do should have a proper purpose and rotation without a good reason is just stupid. Rotation should happen to support how you want to move the club.

Ryan Koenigsberg, Jake Schwanitz and Scott Procter share their thoughts on Georgia Tech EDGE rusher Brayden Manely calling Julian Lewis “a little kid” and how this is even more motivation for the Buffs heading into the 2026 season. videos.title: 6 Everyday Things That Are Dirtier Than You Think | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
6 Everyday Things That Are Dirtier Than You Think | Dr. Mandell Some of the dirtiest things in your home are the everyday objects and surfaces you touch without giving them a second thought. In this video, you’ll discover six common household germ traps, including what can happen when you flush the toilet with the lid open, why your kitchen sponge may hold more bacteria than you realize, why wet utensils should not go back into the drawer, how a damp bath mat can contribute to foot fungus, why your remote control may be one of the dirtiest objects in your living room, and how the bottoms of your shoes can carry dirt and germs throughout your home. These simple tips can help you improve household hygiene, reduce the spread of bacteria and fungus, and create a cleaner, healthier environment for you and your family.

Instead of bread! A PROTEIN breakfast in 10 minutes! ONLY 3 ingredients! Instead of bread! A PROTEIN breakfast in 10 minutes! ONLY 3 ingredients!

1¼ cups (200 g) ricotta.
2/3 cup (150 ml) water. 1 tbsp psyllium husk.
1 tsp baking soda. 2 tbsp brown or black rice. 1/2 tsp salt.
Let the dough rest for 15 mins.
Divide the dough into 3 equal portions.
Optional: sprinkle with sesame seeds on top.
Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (180°C) for about 25 mins.

videos.title: This ring replaces your keyboard?
videos.summary_source_text:
This ring replaces your keyboard? This RING Replaces Your Keyboard??

Meet the OASIS 1, a titanium smart ring designed to change how you interact with your devices.

Instead of typing, you simply whisper your emails, messages, or AI prompts. The ring's noise-isolating microphone captures your voice, and Wispr Flow instantly converts it into text.

To navigate, the top of the ring features a miniature 2D trackpad with haptic feedback, allowing you to scroll, move your cursor, and edit text using just your thumb.

I haven't seen any AI device like this before.

Would you swap your keyboard and mouse for a smart ring? Let me know your thoughts in the comments! 👇

videos.title: She Couldn’t Hit Her Driver Straight…Until We Fixed This Downswing Move
videos.summary_source_text:
She Couldn’t Hit Her Driver Straight…Until We Fixed This Downswing Move ⛳️ Take Your FREE Game Assessment → https://meandmygolf.com/game-plan/?utm_source=YouTube&utm_medium=Description&utm_campaign=20.07.26

📱 Download the Swing Coach App (2-Week Free Trial) → https://go.meandmygolf.com/swingcoach/yt/?utm_source=YouTube&utm_medium=Description&utm_campaign=20.07.26

Christie was an athletic golfer, but her driver swing was getting steep and working a little over the top. The main reason was her lower body was swaying, which left her upper body leading the downswing and caused the club to cut across the ball.

In this lesson, we worked on stabilising the lower body, improving her position at the top, and then using the lower body to lead the downswing. Once her body sequence improved, the club started to shallow, her path became more neutral, and her drives started flying much straighter.

If your driver swing gets steep, you come over the top, or you struggle to stop cutting across the ball, this lesson will show you how the body can help create a better downswing without forcing the club into position.

videos.title: Why Sean Payton and the Denver Broncos are the Spain of the NFL in 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
Why Sean Payton and the Denver Broncos are the Spain of the NFL in 2026 Sean Payton and the Denver Broncos are establishing a new winning cycle for the franchise similar to the run the Spanish national soccer team went on to win the 2026 World Cup. The DNVR Broncos podcast explores why Denver parallels Spain’s dominant sporting style in 2026. The crew examines which current Broncos stars would make a hypothetical USMNT football squad while breaking down the latest team news including Bo Nix landing 59th on the NFL’s top-100 list. 
Join Ryan Koenigsberg and Andre Simone for all things Broncos, NFL and more.

videos.title: Grok 5 Explained: The $60 Billion AI Bet Nobody Is Talking About
videos.summary_source_text:
Grok 5 Explained: The $60 Billion AI Bet Nobody Is Talking About Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
What if Grok 5's biggest upgrade isn't more parameters—but better coding data?

Elon Musk's xAI reportedly made a massive $60 billion move by acquiring Cursor AI, and it could completely reshape how Grok 5 competes with GPT-6, Claude, and every other AI coding assistant.

In this video, we break down:

✅ Why Cursor AI matters more than parameter counts
✅ How Grok 5 could become one of the best coding AI models
✅ What this acquisition means for developers
✅ Why everyone is focusing on the wrong metric
✅ The biggest limitations no one is talking about

Rather than chasing another AI hype cycle, we examine what this acquisition actually means for Grok 5's coding capabilities, pricing strategy, transparency, and competition with OpenAI and Anthropic.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports

• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Buy your tickets for LIV UK here! https://tinyurl.com/3bvjc8dz USE "RICK15UK" at checkout!

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par.

videos.title: Your Diet Programs Your Baby
videos.summary_source_text:
Your Diet Programs Your Baby Science shows that what you eat during pregnancy may influence how your baby’s genes behave for the rest of their life. How crazy is that.

Scientists call this epigenetics. Think of it like dimmer switches sitting on top of your DNA. These switches can turn certain genes on or off depending on the environment in the womb.

Nutrients, stress, sleep, and metabolic health all send messages about what kind of world the baby should prepare for.

This is powerful because it shows that parents may have influence long before birth. Small daily choices may help build a stronger foundation for brain development, metabolism, and lifelong health.

This is why I wrote a book all about pregnancy nutrition. It's called 9 Months That Count Forever and contains all the science and easy practical tips I used during my own pregnancy.

videos.title: So what does chapstick have to do with golf???
videos.summary_source_text:
So what does chapstick have to do with golf??? Raise your hand if you have a slice 🙋🏼‍♀️

No, we’re not encouraging any cheating on the links - but plenty of you have asked us to prove (or disprove) the age-old “member guest” hack.

Chapstick, Vaseline and even PAM have been spotted in golfer’s bags as a way to reduce friction off the face...therefore...reducing your spin.

QUICK TEST:
➡️ 10 shots
➡️ 100 mph
➡️ Beez Nuts Balms Coating

If you don’t mind the product being non-conforming (AND YOU’RE NOT COMPETING), $4 chapstick could be the solution over a $600 driver.

Know someone who’s spraying it right...constantly?

SHARE 👉🏽 this with a golfer in need 😂

videos.title: 7 Reasons You Suck at Golf
videos.summary_source_text:
7 Reasons You Suck at Golf Stop wasting shots! In this video, we share 7 simple golf course management strategy tips to instantly drop your handicap and stop making dumb mistakes that ruin your round. Whether you are trying to break 100, break 90, or break 80 in golf, mastering your tee shot strategy, recovery shots, and smart scoring habits is the easiest way to lower golf scores without changing your swing mechanics.

00:00 - The 7 Dumb Mistakes Killing Your Golf Score
00:25 - Tee Shot Strategy: Driver vs Safe Options
01:30 - The Hero Flop Shot vs High-Percentage Chips
02:35 - Wasting Short Putts & Handling Frustration
03:30 - How to Play Recovery Shots (Stop Chipping Sideways!)
04:20 - Smart Strategy for Carrying Water Hazards
05:10 - How to Avoid Sucker Pins & Front/Back Pin Placement
06:10 - Why You Should Ditch the 3-Wood Off the Deck
07:05 - Stop Making These Golf Scoring Errors!

- Why driver isn't always the best club off the tee
- How to stop taking on low-percentage flop shots
- The mistake golfers make after missing birdie putts
- How to recover from trouble without making a bigger mistake
- Why carrying hazards often costs more shots than it saves
- How to identify "sucker pins" and choose smarter targets
- When to leave the 3-wood in the bag

If you're trying to break 100, break 90 or finally break 80, improving your decisions can lower your scores faster than changing your golf swing.

videos.summary_source_text:
The Ultimate Brain Reset: Break Bad Habits for Good How do you unclog your dopamine receptors? The key is changing your environment and adding friction between you and the things you’re trying to avoid.

🌟 Take the 2-minute Health Lever Quiz: https://drbrg.co/3SCfAWr

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

Here are a few ways to change your environment, reset your dopamine, and regain control:

• Remove junk food from the house
• Distance yourself from unhealthy influences
• Spend more time in nature
• Create more downtime
• Use ashwagandha
• Make unhealthy habits less convenient

Sometimes the simplest solution is to make the habit harder to access.

#dopamine #dopaminedetox #motivation #ashwagandha #mentalhealth #habits #selfimprovement #healthtips #wellness #addictionrecovery

If you've ever been told to keep the club low and slow in your golf swing takeaway, this video will make you rethink everything. Eric Cogorno shows exactly why low and slow sends the club too far inside and under plane — and replaces it with two simple mantras any golfer can use: wide and up with the arms and club, centered and turned with the body. Watch how Adam Scott and Nelly Korda start their golf backswing with the club head above the hip while the hands stay below — and how the lead hand and trail hand drills give you the same feeling in minutes. These golf backswing tips apply to any golfer regardless of handicap or ability level. If you leave this video without trying the lead hand only drill, you're leaving a better golf swing takeaway on the table.

What You'll Learn:
• Why low and slow in the golf swing takeaway sends the club too far inside and under plane
• The wide and up mantra: butt of the club outside the trail thigh, club head above the hip
• How Adam Scott and Nelly Korda execute a wide and up golf swing takeaway
• The centered and turned body mantra that prevents the upper body from drifting away from the target
• The lead hand only drill for training width and centered turn in the golf backswing
• The trail hand only drill for exaggerating width and feeling the correct takeaway position
• How to use the Swing Coach app to check swing plane and spine position during the takeaway
• How getting the golf swing takeaway right makes everything in the downswing easier

videos.title: PGA TOUR Highlights | Corales Puntacana | 2026
videos.summary_source_text:
PGA TOUR Highlights | Corales Puntacana | 2026 Check out all the best shots from the 2026 Corales Puntacana Championship, featuring Ben James, Will Gordon, Gordon Sargent and Stefano Mazzoli, among others.

The PGA TOUR heads to the Dominican Republic this week for the Corales Puntacana Championship, the fourth Additional Event of the 2026 season. Co-sanctioned with the DP World Tour and contested alongside The Open Championship, the tournament makes its first appearance in July after previously occupying an April date, presenting a different test at the scenic Corales Golf Course. Defending champion Garrick Higgo returns looking to become the first two-time winner of the event, while Taylor Pendrith arrives with momentum after his playoff runner-up finish at the ISCO Championship. Joel Dahmen also returns to the site of his lone PGA TOUR victory, hoping to rebound after narrowly missing out on the title a year ago. The field is further strengthened by top-ranked Germans Matti Schmid and Stephan Jaeger, while Aaron Wise continues his return to PGA TOUR competition following an encouraging T3 finish at the ISCO Championship. More than 40 DP World Tour members are also set to tee it up, highlighting the event's international appeal. With 300 FedExCup points on the line and valuable opportunities remaining before the closing stretch of the season, the Corales Puntacana Championship once again promises a compelling week of golf on one of the PGA TOUR's most picturesque venues.

videos.title: Kimi Antonelli On Winning At Spa | Belgian GP Review | F1 Nation Podcast
videos.summary_source_text:
Kimi Antonelli On Winning At Spa | Belgian GP Review | F1 Nation Podcast Tom Clarkson is joined by race-winner Kimi Antonelli, F1TV lead presenter Laura Winter and two-time Le Mans podium finisher Alex Brundle to review the Belgian Grand Prix. 

Kimi converted pole to secure his sixth win of the season and move 45 points clear at the top of the World Championship. 12 months on from last year’s Belgian Grand Prix, one of his most challenging weekends of the 2025 season, how has the 19-year-old made such an incredible transformation?  

Kimi joins us in the Mercedes motorhome to reflect on his victory and a close fight with Ferrari’s Charles Leclerc.  

You’ll also hear reaction from George Russell, whose DNF after a collision with Lewis Hamilton on lap 1 leaves him 50 points adrift of Antonelli. What do the guys make of that incident, the comments George has made about his car’s problems and where he goes from here? 

Tom, Laura and Alex also discuss how surprised they were by Ferrari’s pace, Max Verstappen’s third podium of the season, and whether Lando Norris could have won without his grid penalty.

00:00 - 'So mature and measured'
05:23 - Kimi talks through his win
12:24 - Can George find an answer?
19:48 - Why Hungary is 'wide open'
31:09 - Ferrari's Spa surprise
46:28 - Red Bull 'on a knife-edge'
50:43 - Did McLaren miss out?
55:38 - Hadjar for DOTD?

videos.title: Jaecoo 8 Review: PROOF German SUVs are overpriced!
videos.summary_source_text:
Jaecoo 8 Review: PROOF German SUVs are overpriced! This is our in-depth review of the Jaecoo 8 SUV. We’ll run you through the design, the interior, what it’s like to drive, and test its acceleration from 0mph to 60mph.

Get 20% off Car Vertical using code Carwow: https://www.carvertical.com/carwow

This is the all-new Jaecoo 8! 

It’s a competitor to renowned, established family SUVs like the Skoda Kodiaq and Hyundai Santa Fe. The question is, does this all-new Chinese competitor have what it takes to overcome them? Let’s take a closer look… 

Starting with the design, it’s fair to say Jaecoo seems to have taken some inspiration from Audi! The shape and size of the grille, coupled with the headlight design, look to have been lifted from an Audi Q7! The vertical slats within the grille also seem incredibly similar to what recent Mercedes SUVs have to offer. Around the back, there’s a full-length light bar, a roof spoiler, and the brand’s name is embossed across the boot - as seen in almost every new car these days! All in all, it looks like a premium car from whatever angle you look at it. 

Step inside, and it seems Jaecoo has once again taken inspiration from another brand - but this time it’s Mercedes instead of Audi! The positioning of the vents, buttons and drive selector stalks all seem similar to what you’ll find in a Mercedes, even if the quality is a bit lower down the pecking order. There’s a relatively large infotainment screen and digital dial display which serve their purpose well enough, and the cabin is relatively well built. There’s also a good amount of storage throughout. 

The Jaecoo 8 is powered by a 1.5-litre hybrid petrol engine that can deliver 428hp. This powers the front wheels, and it can accelerate to 60mph in just 5.8 seconds.

Do forgiving clubs IMPROVE your score? 🤔 Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

To cut through the hype.

videos.title: Why Women in 50s Have Shoulder Problems?
videos.summary_source_text:
Why Women in 50s Have Shoulder Problems? Why do so many women get frozen shoulder in their 50s? 

One of the biggest reasons appears to be the hormonal changes that happen during perimenopause and menopause.

When estrogen drops, it sets off a cascade of changes:

• Inflammation tends to increase.
• The shoulder becomes more prone to fibrosis (excess scar tissue), which can limit movement.
• Blood sugar regulation often gets worse, leading to more advanced glycation end products (AGEs), which can increase inflammation and make connective tissue stiffer.

Put all of that together, and it's not surprising that frozen shoulder is so common in women between 45 and 60.

The good news? 

Frozen shoulder is usually temporary.

For most people, it takes 1 to 3 years to resolve, but with patience, smart movement, and a progressive rehab program, there's a very good chance you'll regain most or all of your shoulder motion.

The biggest mistake is assuming it's your new normal.

It usually isn't.

QUESTION: Have you dealt with frozen shoulder yourself? Why do so many women get frozen shoulder in their 50s?

The good news?

videos.summary_source_text:
CUP DAY IN JERSEY! Carolina Hurricanes' Nic Deslauriers Celebrates with Cup + Neuchev Re-Signed As we're now 71 days from opening night for the Carolina Hurricanes, what is the most recent news surrounding the team and the NHL as a whole? We have a cup celebration in New Jersey, a player re-signs, and the NHL's contract sticker prices are on the increase. Welcome to a new era of the National Hockey League! On the Monday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes,  Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on Nic Deslauriers' day with the cup and how the newest hype man has planted himself as a loved teammate in the locker room. How much did it mean to Deslauriers to get his name on the cup with the Hurricanes, and how he has already been placed in high esteem not only with players, but the franchise overall? Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on the re-signing of Viktor Neuchev. What does it mean for the Hurricanes and the Chicago Wolves? What can people expect from Neuchev? Finally, Zach concludes the show by sharing his thoughts on the NHL as a whole. Between Leo Carlsson getting a massive payday and Connor Bedard's new deal, we are entering a new era of the NHL. All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: 474. Rikedomskiftet för ett rikare liv: fyra faser och sex förflyttningar | Med Moa Diseborn
videos.summary_source_text:
474. Rikedomskiftet för ett rikare liv: fyra faser och sex förflyttningar | Med Moa Diseborn Vilka är skiftena på den ekonomiska resan? Vilka är fällorna de flesta hamnar i? Vad händer när mer pengar inte förändrar vardagen i någon större omfattning? Det är frågan bakom Moas modell "The Wealth Shift". Avsnittet blev ärligt talat också mer personligt än jag hade tänkt från början eftersom jag insåg tydligt var jag själv fortfarande sitter fast. 

Moa har kokat ner alla år vi jobbat med de här frågorna till en egen modell med fyra faser (get rich, stay rich, live rich, leave rich) och sex tankeskiften man behöver rör sig genom längs den ekonomiska resan och när pengarna väl finns där.

Det handlar om att gå från ett bristtänk till att våga tänka att det finns tillräckligt, från prestation och nyttovärde till identitet, från att samla på hög till att veta vad man faktiskt vill. Och det viktigaste: de flesta av skiftena går att börja med oavsett var du står ekonomiskt.

Några av ämnena vi tar upp i veckans avsnitt:
• Varför vi nästan aldrig pratar om vad som händer när pengarna väl finns där
• De fyra faserna: get rich, stay rich, live rich och leave rich
• Från brist till tillräckligt, och varför "nästa miljon" aldrig räcker
• Från prestation till identitet: vem du är när du inte längre behöver bevisa något
• Från ackumulering till avsikt, när nästa miljon tappar sin lockelse
• Ensamheten som kan följa med framgång, och vägen till tillhörighet
• Från framgång till bidrag: vad du vill förstärka i världen
• Arv som något du lever redan i dag, inte bara lämnar efter dig

Vi hoppas att du gillar avsnittet,
Jan, Caroline och Moa Diseborn

Innehållsförteckning och kapitel:
====
00:00:00 – Introduktion till avsnittet
00:03:00 – Varför vi aldrig pratar om vad som händer sen
00:04:37 – De fyra faserna: get rich, stay rich, live rich, leave rich
00:06:49 – Invändningen att det bara är ett lyxproblem
00:10:43 – Förflyttning 1: från brist till tillräckligt
00:14:14 – Målflaggan som flyttas och rädslan att sluta jaga
00:21:52 – Förflyttning 2: från prestation till identitet
00:23:38 – Jans tillit, Moas postcovid och lärdomen
00:27:47 – Delpersonligheterna: de många olika Jan
00:35:10 – Moment 22 med Caroline: rädslan att jobba mindre
00:38:38 – Förflyttning 3: från ackumulering till avsikt
00:41:56 – Livet var enklare när banken sa nej: analysparalys
00:47:13 – Förflyttning 4: från isolering till tillhörighet
00:50:48 – Därför startade vi nätverket Flocken
00:54:15 – Förflyttning 5: från framgång till bidrag
00:59:58 – Förflyttning 6: från rikedom till arv
01:04:35 – Nästa steg i morgon: lilla stegets kraft
01:07:57 – Sammanfattning: sårbarhet som generositet och provinspelning

videos.title: Ryan Fox’s UNIQUE move | Champion Golfer of the Year
videos.summary_source_text:
Ryan Fox’s UNIQUE move | Champion Golfer of the Year Before his win today at The 154th Open at Royal Birkdale, we had the newest major champion Ryan Fox break his swing on the range at the 2026 Cadillac Championship.

The new Champion Golfer of the Year discusses the unique tendencies of his swing, such as his extremely pointed left toe, the way he bends at the side on the downswing and his strong grip.

videos.title: The Vitamin That Helps Keep Calcium Out of Your Arteries | Dr. Mandell
videos.summary_source_text:
The Vitamin That Helps Keep Calcium Out of Your Arteries | Dr. Mandell Vitamin K2 has become one of the most talked-about nutrients for supporting healthy aging, strong bones, and cardiovascular health—but what does the science really show? In this video, Dr. Alan Mandell explains how vitamin K2 activates important proteins involved in calcium regulation, helping your body direct calcium to your bones and helping inhibit inappropriate calcium deposits in soft tissues such as your arteries. You'll learn the difference between vitamin K1 and vitamin K2, why vitamin K1 is abundant in leafy green vegetables, and why vitamin K2 is found primarily in fermented foods such as natto, certain aged cheeses, egg yolks, and some animal products. I also explain the two most common supplemental forms of vitamin K2—MK-4 and MK-7—why MK-7 is the form most often chosen for daily supplementation because it remains active in the bloodstream longer, and how to take it for optimal absorption with a meal containing healthy fats. We'll discuss how vitamin D3 and vitamin K2 work together in calcium metabolism, the differences between arterial calcification and cholesterol plaque, who may benefit from increasing K2-rich foods, and when supplementation may be appropriate. Most importantly, you'll learn why no vitamin can replace controlling blood pressure, cholesterol, blood sugar, inflammation, exercise, and a healthy diet when it comes to protecting your heart and blood vessels. I also cover important safety precautions, including why anyone taking warfarin (Coumadin) or other medications should speak with their healthcare professional before starting vitamin K2 supplements. If you've ever wondered whether vitamin K2 can help support healthier arteries and stronger bones, this evidence-based video will help separate scientific facts from myths so you can make informed decisions about your health.

videos.title: Why poor weight shift kills iron compression #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Why poor weight shift kills iron compression #golfswing #golftips Many golfers make what feels like a good swing but still struggle to compress their irons. When pressure stays on the back foot and doesn’t move into the lead side, the low point shifts too far back, leading to thin strikes and weak ball flight. Improving weight shift helps you strike the ball first and produce more powerful, consistent contact.
If iron strike or compression is holding your game back, head to the link in our bio. Our coaching plans give you clear guidance on weight shift, low point, and impact so you can hit your irons with confidence.
