videos.title: How To Transition From Backswing To Downswing In The Golf Swing (In Detail)
videos.summary_source_text:
How To Transition From Backswing To Downswing In The Golf Swing (In Detail) In this golf lesson, Eric Cogorno shows high handicap golfers how hip and leg motion in the backswing creates a flowing transition and better ball striking.

⏱️ Timestamps:
🔍 0:00 - Eric Cogorno: how hip and leg motion connects the backswing and downswing
💡 2:14 - Why high handicap golfers treat the backswing and downswing as two separate events
📐 3:04 - How leg flex and foot flare control hip turn and tilt in the backswing
💪 5:10 - Trail leg extension: how much flex to lose and why it matters
⛳ 8:04 - Trail hip to the midline: the backswing checkpoint that sets up the downswing
🔄 10:08 - How the hips start moving toward the target before the backswing is finished
🏆 12:35 - Downswing checkpoint: tailbone past the midline at the finish
🎯 15:41 - Belt buckle forward drill: how to feel the correct hip motion through the ball

🏌️ WORK WITH ERIC COGORNO IN PERSON!
Two-Day Golf Schools in Florida and Pennsylvania - Limited Spots Available!
📞 Call or text us at ‪(610) 756-7730‬ to discuss if our golf schools are a good fit for you.
👉 Register Here: https://bit.ly/48bbScn

📱 GET THE SWING COACH APP
The BEST Golf Swing Training App Ever Created
👉 Download Here: https://inf.getswingcoach.com/EC1

🎯 PERSONALIZED ONLINE COACHING
Get Custom Golf Instruction from Eric Cogorno
👉 Learn More: https://www.cogornogolf.com

📚 STEP-BY-STEP TRAINING PROGRAMS
Eric's Complete Golf Improvement System
👉 Start Here: https://ericcogornogolf.podia.com

⭐ OUR AWESOME PARTNERS AND DISCOUNT CODES ⭐
🏌️ Takomo Golf Clubs - https://takomogolf.com
👕 Bobby Jones Apparel: https://bobbyjones.com/COGORNO
Code: COGORNO25 for 25% OFF
🧥 Sunice Apparel: https://sunice.com/COGORNO
Code: COGORNO25 for 25% OFF
🎯 Precision Impact Right Wrist Trainer - https://pureswingproducts.com/?sca_ref=1815522.bXQUsGp2bS (Code: COGORNO for $20 OFF)
⛳ theHanger Training Aid - https://www.hangergolf.com/?sca_ref=944104.HqM9GYcX2I (Code: COGORNO for 15% OFF)

If you treat your backswing and downswing as two separate events, this golf instruction lesson will change how you think about your golf swing. Eric Cogorno and Steve Sieracki break down the ground-up sequence — leg flex, trail hip to the midline, hips flowing forward — that separates the best ball strikers from high handicap golfers. Watch how PGA Tour Pro Tommy Fleetwood uses this exact hip and leg motion to create one of the most coordinated, flowing transitions in professional golf — and how these high handicap golf tips give any golfer the same checkpoints to work from. Getting this sequence right gives you better contact, more power, and a more inside-out swing path. If you leave this video without trying the belt buckle forward drill, you're leaving consistency and distance on the table.

videos.title: The #1 Secret to Activating Your Cancer-Killing Cells
videos.summary_source_text:
The #1 Secret to Activating Your Cancer-Killing Cells Vitamin D deficiency can cause more health issues than most people realize. Discover the surprising connection between vitamin D and your immune system, and why maintaining healthy vitamin D levels is so important.

0:00 The real purpose of vitamin D3 
0:42 Vitamin D and the immune system
2:09 Autoimmune diseases
2:23 Vitamin D, gut health, and immune system support
2:50 The immune system and stress
4:29 Vitamin D receptor resistance
4:50 The Coimbra Protocol
6:43 Cod liver oil, sun exposure, and vitamin D
8:05 Vitamin K2, magnesium, and zinc

🌟Download Dr. Berg's Free Daily Health Routine: https://drbrg.co/3TiFFKz

Check out Dr. Coimbra's full interview here: 
▶️ https://youtu.be/cmPEA0EWd7g

Keep watching to learn more about the connection between sunlight and vitamin D: 
▶️ https://youtu.be/AoUmVgPozSE
▶️ https://youtu.be/Sn7T46fCjLE 

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

Can you take too much vitamin D? Find out here:
https://drbrg.co/4bNCctR

Find a Coimbra Protocol provider here:
https://www.hsctstopsms.com/simple-overview-of-coimbra-vitamin-d-protocol/list-of-coimbra-protocol-doctors-worldwide/ 

Autoimmune diseases are becoming increasingly common, but what’s driving this trend?

Vitamin D’s most important role is helping regulate the immune system. Your immune system protects against viruses, fungi, yeast, bacteria, and abnormal cells, while also helping distinguish between healthy and unhealthy cells. Every major immune cell involved in this process depends on vitamin D.

Rather than simply creating a stronger immune system, vitamin D helps support normal immune function and a balanced immune response. Vitamin D is especially important for the immune cells in your gut, where a large portion of the body’s immune system resides.

Some people with adequate vitamin D levels still develop autoimmune diseases. Chronic stress is one factor that may influence immune function by increasing cortisol, which can suppress the immune system. Low vitamin D levels combined with chronic stress may further affect immune function.

Around 25% of people have vitamin D receptor resistance, which can affect how their bodies respond to vitamin D. This may help explain why some people require more vitamin D than others.

DATA: 
https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC7812338/
https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC7720099/ 
https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0031938424002828

Dr. Berg is a licensed chiropractor in Virginia, California, and Louisiana, but he no longer practices chiropractic in any state and does not see patients, so he can focus on educating people as a full-time activity, yet he maintains an active license. 👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

You’ll see:

• Matches against tour players and creators

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access

• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:

videos.title: Golf 101: Backswing Basics From the Pros
videos.summary_source_text:
Golf 101: Backswing Basics From the Pros This common golf swing mistake is one of many things that separates tour pros from amateur golfers who struggle with their golf swings. Excessive trail arm bend is something that hursts amateurs during their backswings and leads to all sorts of issues at impact. 

Learn a proper golf backswing and start hitting more consistent golf shots. This common golf swing mistake is one of many things that separates tour pros from amateur golfers who struggle with their golf swings. Excessive trail arm bend is something that hursts amateurs during their backswings and leads to all sorts of issues at impact.

videos.title: Bob MacIntyre on the Range | Full Practice Session
videos.summary_source_text:
Bob MacIntyre on the Range | Full Practice Session Robert MacIntyre's full range session from the 2026 Genesis Scottish Open.

► SUBSCRIBE: http://et.golf/Subscribe 

The Rolex Series returns as we head to The Renaissance Club for the PGA TOUR co-sanctioned Genesis Scottish Open. The events bring enhanced prize money and points, with a prize fund of US $9,000,000 and 8,000 Race to Dubai points on offer. This season, the Championship layout at The Renaissance Club has been rerouted to build an exciting closing stretch for both players and fans. Scotland's national open has long attracted a global field but since its co-sanctioning with the PGA TOUR in 2022 it has become a truly world-class spectacular. World Numbers One and Two Scottie Scheffler and McIlroy headline the field and they are joined by fellow reigning Major champions Rai and Wyndham Clark. MacIntyre will once again be expected to lead the home charge, in a field that features 11 of the 12 Europeans who won the Ryder Cup at Bethpage last year.

Welcome to the Official YouTube channel of the DP World Tour. Every week you can find extended tournament highlights and individual player highlights from the likes of Rory McIlroy, Justin Rose and Tommy Fleetwood. This is also the home of the 14 Club Challenge, Little Interviews, Fastest Hole and many more challenges, pranks and world record attempts featuring the biggest golfers in the world.

World Numbers One and Two Scottie Scheffler and McIlroy headline the field and they are joined by fellow reigning Major champions Rai and Wyndham Clark. MacIntyre will once again be expected to lead the home charge, in a field that features 11 of the 12 Europeans who won the Ryder Cup at Bethpage last year.

Welcome to the Official YouTube channel of the DP World Tour. Every week you can find extended tournament highlights and individual player highlights from the likes of Rory McIlroy, Justin Rose and Tommy Fleetwood. This is also the home of the 14 Club Challenge, Little Interviews, Fastest Hole and many more challenges, pranks and world record attempts featuring the biggest golfers in the world.

videos.title: Cutter Gauthier Wants A Piece Of The Carlsson Pie In Anaheim | GS Off Ice OffSzn w/ Zach Cavanagh
videos.summary_source_text:
Cutter Gauthier Wants A Piece Of The Carlsson Pie In Anaheim | GS Off Ice OffSzn w/ Zach Cavanagh Welcome back to a special league-wide edition of Guerilla Sports Off Ice! 

Leo Carlsson's $90M offer-sheet continues to be arguably the biggest news of the NHL offseason. Now that the Ducks have offically matched Philly’s offer and have the contract on their books, what does it mean for Anaheim? Rumors are circulating that Cutter Gauthier won’t take a penny less than Leo’s new contract. Will the Ducks be able to shake their new contract issues? Or is this the start of a downfall in SoCal?

We’re joined on the episode by a very special guest, Zach Cavanagh! Zach is an Anaheim Ducks reporter for The Sporting Tribune, host of the ‘Ducks in Deep’ Podcast and a member of the Anaheim Chapter of the PHWA. Zach gives his inside perspective on the Leo Carlsson contract situation, how the Ducks community is reacting to matching the offer-sheet, and his understanding of how Anaheim will tackle their cap situation now that they have an NHL record-breaking contract on their books.

After chatting with Zach, Mark Robinson is joined by Michael Gurzhiev, a senior creative at Guerilla Sports, who is pinch-hitting for Jesse Montano while he’s out on vacation. Mark and Michael overview a handful of topics, and close things out with a fun game.

🏒Macklin Celebrini on cover of NHL 27

videos.title: 15.07.26 - Prediction Markets Deep Dive: Risk, Strategy & the Future of Financial Intelligence
videos.summary_source_text:
15.07.26 - Prediction Markets Deep Dive: Risk, Strategy & the Future of Financial Intelligence Welcome to the continuation of our RIFT Before You Quit Bonus Series, where we continue our deep dive into one of the most exciting innovations in modern finance—Prediction Markets.

In this episode, we move beyond the basics and explore how professional traders, institutions, and intelligent financial systems evaluate uncertainty through probability-driven markets. We also explain how Hyperliquid's HIP-4 infrastructure provides the foundation for RIFT's prediction market ecosystem, delivering a fast, transparent, and scalable environment for trading real-world outcomes.

Unlike traditional financial markets that focus solely on asset prices, prediction markets allow participants to trade the probability of future events. Every contract represents a clearly defined outcome, and understanding the exact wording of that contract is one of the most important skills for any participant.

In this episode you'll discover:

- Why contract wording matters in prediction markets
- The difference between similar-looking contracts that produce completely different outcomes
- How event definitions, timestamps and settlement rules determine the value of a prediction contract
- Why professional traders always read the full contract before entering a position
- Understanding market-implied probability versus personal probability estimates

We then move into one of the most important educational sections of the series—risk management within prediction markets.

You'll learn about the major categories of risk that every participant should understand, including:

• Forecasting Risk

• Liquidity Risk

• Resolution Risk

• Oracle Risk

• Platform Risk

• Regulatory Risk

• Behavioural Risk

• Correlation Risk

Each risk is explained using practical examples, including sporting events, cryptocurrency markets, macroeconomic announcements, and real-world trading scenarios.

The episode also explores how liquidity influences pricing, why some contracts experience greater volatility than others, and how large market participants can temporarily influence market pricing through capital flows.

Another major focus is professional decision-making.

Rather than simply guessing outcomes, experienced participants follow a structured framework that includes:

Reading the complete contract
Understanding settlement rules
Estimating probabilities
Comparing market pricing
Assessing liquidity
Position sizing
Monitoring developing information
Reviewing results after settlement

These principles form the foundation of disciplined participation and help separate probability-based decision making from emotional speculation.

Throughout the session, we also explain how RIFT simplifies many of these processes by leveraging Hyperliquid's infrastructure to provide users with a streamlined prediction market experience.

The discussion then expands into the broader future of prediction markets and their potential applications far beyond trading.

Topics include:

Financial market forecasting
Corporate decision making
Economic research
Public policy
Artificial intelligence
Organisational risk management
Information discovery
Probability-based forecasting systems

One of the key takeaways from this episode is that prediction markets are not designed to predict the future with certainty.

Instead, they create transparent, financially incentivised systems where different opinions compete through market pricing. As new information becomes available, probabilities adjust dynamically, creating a live representation of collective market expectations.

The episode also explains why a market price should never be confused with a guarantee. A contract trading at a 70% probability is not promising that an event will happen—it simply reflects the current consensus based on available information.

By understanding probability, liquidity, pricing, settlement, and behavioural psychology, traders can make more informed decisions while avoiding many of the emotional mistakes that affect traditional market participants.

In this episode you'll learn:

✅ Why contract wording matters

✅ Market-implied probability explained

✅ The major risks of prediction markets

✅ Professional analysis frameworks

✅ Position sizing and capital preservation

✅ Liquidity and execution

✅ Behavioural psychology in prediction trading

✅ AI and the future of probability markets

✅ How RIFT leverages Hyperliquid's HIP-4 infrastructure

✅ Why prediction markets may become a core layer of tomorrow's financial system

The episode concludes with a preview of the next instalment, where we begin exploring Hyperliquid HIP-4 in detail, including fully collateralised outcome contracts, binary and multi-outcome markets, how prediction markets differ from perpetual futures, the RIFT prediction interface, and how prediction markets fit into RIFT's wider ecosystem and future capital participation framework. videos.title: Hindi - 15.07.26 - RIFT Presentation
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi - 15.07.26 - RIFT Presentation RIFT is a modern trading platform that combines automated trading, manual trading, futures trading, and educational tools into one ecosystem.

Designed for both beginners and experienced traders, RIFT aims to simplify access to financial markets while providing users with tools that can help them participate more efficiently.

One of the key features of RIFT is its Auto Trading Engine, which allows users to allocate capital into automated trading strategies designed to operate without the need for constant monitoring. This enables participants to remain active in the markets without spending hours each day analyzing charts or placing trades manually.

For users who prefer direct market participation, RIFT also offers Manual Trading and Futures Trading functionality. This gives traders the flexibility to execute their own strategies, manage positions, and take advantage of market opportunities in real time.

RIFT is built around a non-custodial philosophy, meaning users maintain control of their own funds rather than depositing them into a centralized company account. This approach aligns with the growing demand for greater transparency, security, and user control within the digital asset industry.

Beyond trading, RIFT focuses heavily on education. Through training sessions, community support, and ongoing learning resources, users can develop a deeper understanding of trading, risk management, market psychology, and financial technology.

The platform also incorporates modern technologies such as AI-driven infrastructure, advanced execution systems, copy trading capabilities, and future integrations designed to create a more connected and intelligent trading environment.

Whether you are completely new to trading, looking for automated solutions, interested in futures markets, or seeking to expand your financial knowledge, RIFT aims to provide a complete ecosystem where users can learn, participate, and grow.

• Auto Trading Engine
• Manual Trading
• Futures Trading
• Non-Custodial Infrastructure
• AI-Powered Trading Tools
• Copy Trading Features
• Educational Resources & Training
• Community Support
• Advanced Market Access
• Designed for Beginners and Experienced Traders

videos.title: How To Get Better At Hockey In Between Practices
videos.summary_source_text:
How To Get Better At Hockey In Between Practices Ever notice you play better when you're on the ice with better players? There's a real reason for that and it's because your brain has cells called mirror neurons.

When you watch someone perform a skill, your motor cortex fires a version of the same pattern they're using. You're not moving, but your brain is running the rep. Researchers call it action observation training, and it's used everywhere from pro sports to physical rehab.

Here's why this matters for hockey players specifically: you can't train all day. Ice time is limited, your body needs recovery, and most of your week happens away from the rink. But your brain can keep learning the whole time.

That's why studying the best players is a core part of how we train at Train 2.0. Not casually watching hockey. The mechanics, patterns, the timing, the details most people skip past.

On-ice reps build the skill and studying the best primes it. The players who do both make the biggest improvements in their games.

👉  Drills, breakdowns, progressions, and full mechanics playbook (100's of videos) all available in Train 2.0+ here: https://app.train2point0.com/bundles/membership-plus

videos.title: Top Coach gives me a playing lesson around Minnesota's #1 Course
videos.summary_source_text:
Top Coach gives me a playing lesson around Minnesota's #1 Course What if the reason you aren't shooting lower scores has nothing to do with your golf swing?

In this video, I spend 9 holes at the incredible Interlachen Country Club (Minnesota's #1 ranked course according to Golf Digest) with golf performance coach Dr. Luke Benoit to learn how better golfers actually think on the golf course. We talk course management, decision making, motor learning, practice habits, tournament pressure, and why trying to fix your swing during a round is one of the biggest mistakes golfers make.

If you've ever felt like your range game doesn't show up on the course, this conversation could completely change how you play.

In this video you'll learn:
• Why swing thoughts may or may not help on the course
• How elite golfers make better decisions before every shot
• The difference between practicing golf and playing golf
• How to account for sloped lies
• Why and how to improve your lag putting
• Why tee shot locations make no sense at times
• Should you draw or fade in certain situations?

Whether you're trying to break 100, 90, 80, or finally reach scratch, these lessons will help you think about golf in a completely different way.

⛳ Subscribe for new videos every week:
https://www.youtube.com/@golfwell

https://open.spotify.com/show/7DYxwr4EvPXQf2kJK5qLqo?si=3c64aw6qScK3UllFll4pmw

videos.title: Patrick Kane Punch Progression
videos.summary_source_text:
Patrick Kane Punch Progression The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

👉  Drills, breakdowns, progressions, and full mechanics playbook (100's of videos) all available in Train 2.0+ here: https://app.train2point0.com/bundles/membership-plus

videos.title: The Grip Mistake Most Golfers Make Before They Swing
videos.summary_source_text:
The Grip Mistake Most Golfers Make Before They Swing ⛳️ Take Your FREE Game Assessment → https://meandmygolf.com/game-plan/?utm_source=YouTube&utm_medium=Description&utm_campaign=15.07.26

📱 Download the Swing Coach App (2-Week Free Trial) → https://go.meandmygolf.com/swingcoach/yt/?utm_source=YouTube&utm_medium=Description&utm_campaign=15.07.26

Most golfers think about where their hands go on the club, but very few think about when and where they actually build their grip.

In this video, we show you why setting your grip with the club already on the ground can make it harder to get the club sitting correctly in your hands, and why building your grip in the air gives you a much better chance of starting with control, consistency and confidence.

If your grip often feels uncomfortable, uncertain, or slightly different from shot to shot, this simple change could make a big difference.
You’ll learn:

- Why gripping the club on the ground can cause problems
- How to build your grip before you set the club down
- What to look for in both hands
- How to create a repeatable grip routine before every shot

Try this before your next round and see how much more organised your setup feels.

videos.title: Why Reading Labels Matters
videos.summary_source_text:
Why Reading Labels Matters One of the biggest challenges with sugar is that it often isn't obvious. It's hidden in foods and drinks that many people consume every day. That's why reading food labels matters. Hidden sugars can contribute to blood sugar fluctuations, and over time those swings can have a significant impact on metabolism.

To learn more about how to book a consultation with me please check out https://aristotleeducation.com

All of my social media and official links: https://linktr.ee/pradipjamnadasmd

Remember that my videos are not a substitute for individualized medical care by a qualified physician. Always consult your physicians before making any diet, nutrition, medication, or lifestyle changes.


About Dr. Pradip Jamnadas, MD, MBBS, FACC, FSCAI, FCCP, FACP

The founder and Chief Medical Officer of Aristotle Education and has been practicing medicine in Central Florida for over 35 years. He is also the founder and medical director of Cardiovascular Interventions, PA, where since 1990 he has been repeatedly recognized in local publications as a Top Doctor. Throughout his distinguished career, he has performed thousands of interventional procedures in both hospital and outpatient settings. As a consultant cardiologist with a large diversified inpatient and outpatient practice he is noted for his passions for teaching and illuminating prevention for cardiovascular disease. He is also a clinical assistant professor of medicine at The Florida State University and University of Central Florida. One of the biggest challenges with sugar is that it often isn't obvious. It's hidden in foods and drinks that many people consume every day. That's why reading food labels matters. Hidden sugars can contribute to blood sugar fluctuations, and over time those swings can have a significant impact on metabolism.

If you struggle with pulls, over fades, or weak shots to the right, these high handicap golf tips are going to change how you think about your setup and downswing. In this golf instruction lesson, Eric Cogorno works with a student fighting a steep over-the-top move and fixes his miss pattern in minutes — the student was drawing the ball within five minutes of making two simple changes. The fix starts with closing the shoulder line at setup and adding right side depth in the backswing. These golf drills can be practiced at the range immediately and apply to any golfer who wants to stop pulling it left and start swinging from the inside. If you leave this video without trying the closed shoulder drill, you're leaving distance and consistency on the table.

What You'll Learn:
• Why an open shoulder line at setup causes a steep downswing and pull fades
• How closing the shoulder line at setup automatically shallows the swing path
• High handicap golf tips for eliminating pulls and weak fades with two setup changes
• The alignment stick drill for training the correct follow through direction
• How to feel the right shoulder tuck and correct lead forearm position at setup
• The halfway back to arms parallel drill for training face rotation through impact
• Why a deeper right-side turn in the backswing makes inside-out golf instruction feel natural
• How to take the same golf swing feels to driver for more distance and less weak right shots

If you struggle with pulls, over fades, or weak shots to the right, these high handicap golf tips are going to change how you think about your setup and downswing. In this golf instruction lesson, Eric Cogorno works with a student fighting a steep over-the-top move and fixes his miss pattern in minutes — the student was drawing the ball within five minutes of making two simple changes. The fix starts with closing the shoulder line at setup and adding right side depth in the backswing. These golf drills can be practiced at the range immediately and apply to any golfer who wants to stop pulling it left and start swinging from the inside. If you leave this video without trying the closed shoulder drill, you're leaving distance and consistency on the table.

What You'll Learn:
• Why an open shoulder line at setup causes a steep downswing and pull fades
• How closing the shoulder line at setup automatically shallows the swing path
• High handicap golf tips for eliminating pulls and weak fades with two setup changes
• The alignment stick drill for training the correct follow through direction
• How to feel the right shoulder tuck and correct lead forearm position at setup
• The halfway back to arms parallel drill for training face rotation through impact
• Why a deeper right-side turn in the backswing makes inside-out golf instruction feel natural
• How to take the same golf swing feels to driver for more distance and less weak right shots

videos.title: Wyndham Clark: "This Putter Changed My Career"
videos.summary_source_text:
Wyndham Clark: "This Putter Changed My Career" It's The Open and Wyndham Clark joins us to talk through the new PING putter that helped him claim his second major title.

He explains why he made the switch, what he looks for in a putter, and what gives him confidence on the greens when the pressure is at its highest.


Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

videos.title: Your Body Is Not the Enemy
videos.summary_source_text:
Your Body Is Not the Enemy So much suffering comes not only from pain, tension, or limitation — but from feeling like your own body has become the enemy.
When you’ve been struggling for a long time, it makes sense that you may try to fix, correct, control, or battle your body.
But sometimes the deepest shift begins when that fight starts to soften.
In this video, I explore what changes when you stop treating your body like a problem to defeat, and I guide you through a short somatic reflection to begin relating to your body differently.
If this speaks deeply to where you are right now, you’re welcome to schedule a Zoom call with me here: https://calendly.com/taroiwamoto/45min

Free Somatic Masterclass — Move More Freely in Your Body
Watch here: https://taro-iwamoto.thinkific.com/courses/masterclass

Read my new book:
Your Body Is Not Broken: A Gentle Somatic Path to Moving with More Ease, Trust, and Freedom
A short Kindle book for anyone tired of trying to fix their body and wanting a gentler way to begin again.
https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0GX363HMX

If you feel ready for deeper, more structured support, you can learn more about my course here:
https://taroiwamoto.com/thecourse

About Taro Iwamoto
I help self-aware adults who are exhausted by recurring pain, tension, and fear cycles despite everything they’ve tried, and who are ready to stop chasing fixes and follow a deeper somatic, nervous-system-based path to lasting change, so they can trust their body again and fully live their life with ease, freedom, and confidence.

videos.title: If I Had Cancer, This Is What I Would Do
videos.summary_source_text:
If I Had Cancer, This Is What I Would Do If I were diagnosed with cancer tomorrow, here’s exactly what I would do. I would focus on targeting cancer from a metabolic perspective using prolonged fasting, strategic nutrition, and multiple complementary approaches rather than relying on a single strategy.

🌟 Take the 2-minute Health Lever Quiz: https://drbrg.co/3R7cnxY

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

What I would focus on:
• Prolonged fasting based on the stage and severity
• Eating foods that align with an anticancer approach, including cruciferous vegetables, fermented foods, and polyphenol-rich compounds such as sulforaphane, quercetin, resveratrol, and berberine
• Supporting metabolic health and mitochondrial function
• Considering ivermectin and fenbendazole because of their proposed effects on metabolic pathways and parasite-like survival mechanisms

I’m not claiming any of these are cures; I’m simply sharing what I would personally do if I were facing a cancer diagnosis.

#cancer #fasting #metabolichealth #mitochondria #ketosis #sulforaphane #berberine #ivermectin #fenbendazole #healtheducation

videos.title: IM8: $300 / month. Worth it?
videos.summary_source_text:
IM8: $300 / month. Worth it? IM8 contains vitamins, minerals, probiotics, prebiotics, adaptogens, mushrooms, and other ingredients in a single product.

That sounds great, but it almost guarantees gas, bloating, and disaster pants.

I’m a huge fan of supplements, but stirring up a witch's brew of every possible nutrient is rarely a good approach. Oh, and it’s ridiculously expensive.

Q: Are you taking IM8? What’s been your experience? IM8 contains vitamins, minerals, probiotics, prebiotics, adaptogens, mushrooms, and other ingredients in a single product.

That sounds great, but it almost guarantees gas, bloating, and disaster pants.

videos.title: The #1 MOST Dangerous Breakfast in America (That You Think Is Healthy)
videos.summary_source_text:
The #1 MOST Dangerous Breakfast in America (That You Think Is Healthy) Most people think this breakfast food is healthy, but it’s actually one of the worst breakfast foods you could eat. Discover the worst breakfast foods for your health and the healthiest breakfast to eat instead.

0:00 The worst breakfast foods
0:21 Whole-grain cereal
2:16 Whole wheat side effects
2:51 Phytic acid
3:27 Gut inflammation and whole grain cereals 
6:44 What is the best breakfast?
8:29 No breakfast benefits
9:20 Protein breakfast

🌟 Download Dr. Berg's Free Daily Health Routine: https://drbrg.co/4ffXUrA

Learn more about blood sugar, healthy eating, and the hidden foods that may be harming your health:
▶️ https://youtu.be/ZKAH3GGq2cg
▶️ https://youtu.be/rIgXXXsL69s
▶️ https://youtu.be/H0SE-_unHQ0

Check out this article for a deep dive on the benefits of intermittent fasting and a comprehensive guide on how it's done: https://drbrg.co/4hegjYd

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

Whole-grain cereals, such as oats, are often promoted as a healthy breakfast. Whole-grain oats are commonly associated with lowering cholesterol, but you need over 4 servings to make just a small change. This causes a significant blood sugar spike.

Whole wheat cereals made from modern wheat can raise blood sugar more than many people realize. Starting your day with a high-starch breakfast may contribute to blood sugar fluctuations, sugar cravings, and increased hunger later in the day.

The best breakfast may be no breakfast at all! If you reduce sugar and starch intake and stop snacking, you may find you’re no longer hungry in the morning. Extending your overnight fast can help support metabolic health. 

Keep it simple: eat when you’re hungry, not because it’s breakfast time.

DATA:
https://www.sciencedaily.com/releases/2009/01/090112130653.htm
https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC3705319/ 

Dr. Eric Berg, D.C. Bio:
Dr. Berg, age 61, is a chiropractor who specializes in Healthy Ketosis & Intermittent Fasting. He is the Director of Dr. Berg Nutritionals and author of the best-selling book The Healthy Keto Plan. He no longer practices, but focuses on health education through social media.

Dr. Berg is a licensed chiropractor in Virginia, California, and Louisiana, but he no longer practices chiropractic in any state and does not see patients, so he can focus on educating people as a full-time activity, yet he maintains an active license. 👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

⭐ THE GOAL

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:
https://www.youtube.com/@LIVGolf

videos.title: How to find your PERFECT golf shaft 👀
videos.summary_source_text:
How to find your PERFECT golf shaft 👀 Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

videos.title: TALKIN' PROSPECTS! 2 Carolina Hurricanes Prospects Make Latest Top 100 List
videos.summary_source_text:
TALKIN' PROSPECTS! 2 Carolina Hurricanes Prospects Make Latest Top 100 List On Tuesday, July 14, The Athletic's Scott Wheeler dropped his Top 100 NHL Drafted Prospects list for Summer 2026. Regarding the Carolina Hurricanes,  they had only two players make the Top 100, with a third just missing out as one of the last few to be cut. That said, do their placements make sense, and should there have been another one or two within the organization to be on the list? On the Wednesday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes,  Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on Bradly Nadeau making the list in the Tier 4 range at the 56th spot. Does what Wheeler said about Nadeau make sense, or is he off? Plus, should Nadeau be higher on the list and in a different tier? Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on Ivan Ryabkin making the Tier 6 range at the 98th spot. Should he be higher, or is he in the right spot according to Wheeler? Finally, Zach shares his thoughts on how Felix Unger-Sorum just missed out on the Top 100. Should he have been on the list, or did missing out make sense? Plus, who else within the Hurricanes organization has a case to make the Top 100 list? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: Who’s the TOUGHEST 4x4 EVER! Toyota v Land Rover v Mercedes
videos.summary_source_text:
Who’s the TOUGHEST 4x4 EVER! Toyota v Land Rover v Mercedes We’re testing three second-hand SUVs over a series of challenges on an off-road course to see which offers the best value for its £2,000 price tag. 

Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-1007

We’ve got our hands on three second-hand SUVs, each valued at less than £2,000, and we’re going to see whether they can survive over a series of off-road challenges! 

We’ve got a Land Rover Discovery 3 from 2005, a Mercedes ML from 2005, and a Toyota Land Cruiser from 2002! 

But will they be able to survive these extreme off-road challenges?! Let’s see what each car is working with…

Starting with the Discovery 3, it’s powered by a 2.7-litre V6 that produces 190hp and 440Nm. It’s equipped with a 6-speed manual and weighs 2,419kg. It was first released in 2005, we bought it for £1,500, and it currently has 256,000 miles on the clock. 

Up next is the Mercedes ML. There’s a 2.7-litre inline-5 turbo diesel under the bonnet, and this produces 163hp and 400Nm. It’s equipped with a 5-speed automatic gearbox, weighs around 2,100kg, and was released in 2005. We bought it for £1,800, and it has 140,000 miles on the clock. 

Finally, we come to the Land Cruiser. It’s powered by a 4.7-litre V8, and this puts down 235hp and 434Nm. It rolls up with a 4-speed automatic gearbox, and it weighs 2,260kg. It was originally released in 2002, and although it was originally bought for £5,000, it’s only worth around £2,000 now. To date, it’s run around 282,000 miles.

So which do you think will come out on top? And more importantly, will any of the cars even make it to the end of this video?! Stick with Mat, Sam & Nick to see for yourself!
